layout.header: top: h1 'Pipeline Tracker' + subtitle 'Management Hub — portfolio, team performance, and pipeline views' (left). Date range buttons top right: Last 30 days / Last 90 days / Last 6 months / Last year / Custom
layout.tabs: row at y=176: Heatmap (active, underline) / Gantt / Kanban / Live Flow / Scope
layout.controls: Filters row y=222: Search projects | All Statuses dropdown | dd/mm/yyyy → dd/mm/yyyy date range
layout.heatmap: main grid: title 'Portfolio Heatmap 53 projects' + legend (Healthy 80-100 green / At Risk 50-79 amber / Critical <50 red / No Data gray + Overdue tasks dot / Blocked tasks dot). Columns: Project | Health | Sales | Founders Office | Design | 3D | MEP | QS | IT | Procurement | Inventory | Project Cost. Each row is a project with name + sub-name in left col, then small red Health number, then series of cells with score/count e.g. '50 1/2' (green/amber/red). Many rows visible (Reject Cascading Tasks, Cascading Tasks Innovat, Test Innovations Prest, Nexus Innovations, Marvel Spaces, Pinnacle Dynamics, Apex Fintech variants...)

elements.text: heatmap rows continue — Test Innovations / Nexus / Marvel / Pinnacle / Apex Fintech / etc.
